mapper.sql: id, username, password, name, gender, phone, position, dept_id, image, entry_date, salary, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp (username, password, name, gender, phone, position, dept_id, image, entry_date, salary, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{position}, #{deptId}, #{image}, #{entryDate}, #{salary}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM emp WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM emp ORDER BY create_time DESC
